# Gupta's Pristine Group

> One of the foundational builders of the Delhi-NCR region. Four generations of trust across residential, commercial, retail, warehousing, industrial and luxury farmhouses — since 1973.

Gupta's Pristine Group is a fourth-generation real estate developer founded in 1973, headquartered at Nehru Place, New Delhi. The group develops and trades across six segments — residential, commercial, retail, warehousing, industrial and luxury farmhouses — primarily in Delhi-NCR, with operations extending into Punjab and Haryana. The site is statically generated and available in English and Hindi.

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://www.grouppristine.com/en/): Company overview, legacy, key statistics and featured segments.
- [About](https://www.grouppristine.com/en/about/): A revered name and an established brand in the Indian real estate market.
- [Projects](https://www.grouppristine.com/en/projects/): A diversified portfolio developed across six decades and six segments of the Indian real estate market.
- [News](https://www.grouppristine.com/en/news/): Curated headlines from across the Indian real estate landscape, refreshed regularly.
- [Careers](https://www.grouppristine.com/en/careers/): We are always looking for seasoned professionals and fresh ideas to join our family. Tell us where you'd fit best.
- [Contact](https://www.grouppristine.com/en/contact/): Our family would be glad to hear from you. Reach out and we'll respond as soon as we can.

## Project Segments
- [Residential](https://www.grouppristine.com/en/projects/residential/): Homes that hold a family's story
- [Commercial](https://www.grouppristine.com/en/projects/commercial/): Landmarks that anchor a neighbourhood
- [Retail](https://www.grouppristine.com/en/projects/retail/): Shopping, food and entertainment under one roof
- [Luxury Farmhouses](https://www.grouppristine.com/en/projects/luxury_farmhouses/): The most picturesque addresses in South Delhi
- [Warehousing](https://www.grouppristine.com/en/projects/warehousing/): Cold storage at the scale of a metropolis
- [Industrial](https://www.grouppristine.com/en/projects/industrial/): Sheds and factories that power Faridabad
